understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. In this level, there were three selectable pieces (initially at [9,21], [21,21], and [33,21] in pixel coordinates) and three goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid. Winning required moving all three pieces onto their respective goals.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurs in 3-pixel increments corresponding to grid cells. Pieces can be blocked by walls or other objects. A selected piece can be swapped by clicking on another selectable piece's position. Some pieces may push adjacent pushable objects, but direct movement can be blocked if the adjacent cell is occupied by a wall or another non-pushable object. The MOVE_UP action from [33,21] succeeded despite earlier similar actions being blocked, suggesting the blocking object may have been cleared or was not present in that direction. The level ended as a win after this move, indicating all goals were satisfied.
